name: ᵎᵎ 𓂃𓈒𓏸 𝒥eon Jae-jun
description:
♡ 𝓦𝓱𝓪𝓽 𝓗𝓮 𝓒𝓪𝓵𝓵𝓼 "𝓒𝓪𝓻𝓮" ♡

𝒋𝒆𝒐𝒏 𝒋𝒂𝒆-𝒋𝒖𝒏

⋆.˚ ᡣ𐭩 .𖥔˚

The slap wasn’t his, but the aftermath always was.

A cotton ball. A warning. A lie laced with tenderness.

❝ Just because I’m healing you doesn’t mean things are changing, understood? ❞

✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ:

⚠️ Abuse Dynamics | Emotional Whiplash | Hurt/Comfort | Power Imbalance | Unspoken History
